revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Hobata-jinja]][[ja:火幡神社]] {{Expand Japanese|火幡神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hobata Shrine | native_name = 火幡神社 | image = 火幡神社拝殿 - DHvL2xjUMAAevQ1.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hobata Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.58005|135.698692}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Ame-no-Koyane|lt=Ame-no-Koyane|en|Ame-no-Koyane|fr|Ama-no-Koyane-no-mikoto|it|Ame-no-Koyane|ja|天児屋命|mni|ꯑꯃꯦ-ꯅꯣ-ꯀꯣꯌꯅꯦ|pt|Ame-no-Koyane|ru|Амэ-но коянэ-но микото|simple|Ame-no-Koyane|zh|天兒屋命|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} }} {{nihongo|'''Hobata Shrine'''|火幡神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Myojin Taisha|lt=Myōjin Taisha|en|Myojin Taisha|fr|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|simple|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}} * {{ill|Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|qid=Q135009132|1=Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11433427|ltq=Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} ** Series ordinal: 72 ** P155: {{ill|Fukamisono Shrine|lt=Fukamisono Shrine|qid=Q135038956|1=Fukamisono Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135038957|ltq=Q135038957|qid=Q135038957|1=Shitsumino Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q1346392|ltq=Q1346392|qid=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}} * {{ill|Yamato Province|lt=Yamato Province|be|Ямата (правінцыя)|ca|Província de Yamato|ckb|پارێزگای یەماتۆ|cs|Provincie Jamato|de|Provinz Yamato|el|Επαρχία Γιαμάτο|en|Yamato Province|es|Provincia de Yamato|fa|ولایت یاماتو|fi|Yamaton provinssi|fr|Province de Yamato|gl|Provincia de Yamato|hak|Yamato-koet|id|Provinsi Yamato|it|Yamato (provincia)|ja|大和国|ko|야마토국|lt|Jamato žemė|nl|Yamato (provincie)|no|Yamato (provins)|pt|Província de Yamato|ro|Provincia Yamato|ru|Ямато (провинция)|simple|Yamato Province|sk|Jamato (provincia)|sr|Провинција Јамато|th|แคว้นยามาโตะ|tr|Yamato (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ямато|ur|یاماتو صوبہ|zh_min_nan|Yamato-kok|zh_yue|大和國|zh|大和國|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} * {{ill|Q11620862|ltq=Q11620862|qid=Q11620862|1=Katsuge district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.58005|135.698692}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * 火幡神社拝殿 - DHvL2xjUMAAevQ1.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q2564508|ltq=Q2564508|qid=Q2564508|1=Ame-no-Koyane}} == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041123080623/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22832 == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180731 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * ほばたじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 9150005006135 == Commons category (P373) == * Hobata-jinja == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県北葛城郡王寺町畠田640', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Hobata-jinja}} [[JA:火幡神社]] {{wikidata link|Q43594611}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称= Hobata Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:火幡神社拝殿 - DHvL2xjUMAAevQ1.jpg|270px]]
Haiden
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地= {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|qid=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}{{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|qid=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}Hatakeda 640 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 34 | 緯度秒 = 48 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 41 | 経度秒 = 55 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|qid=Q2564508}}
{{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|qid=Q232803|lt=Okinaga Tarashi-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Empress Jingū}}
{{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}
{{ill|lt=Tamayori-hime (Hyūga myth)|Q3082751|qid=Q3082751|lt=Tamayori-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Tamayori-hime (mother of Jimmu)}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu-kōdaijin|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} ({{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=myōjin major|1=UNKNOWN}})
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建= (trad.) {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|qid=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|qid=Q30021|1=806}}) |本殿= {{ill|lt=shinmei-zukuri|Q930545|qid=Q930545|1=Shinmei-zukuri}} copper-plate roof |例祭= {{ill|lt=July 14|Q2691|qid=Q2691|1=July 14}} |神事= |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Hobata Shrine''' (ほばたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ōji|Q1346392|qid=Q1346392|1=Ōji, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Kitakatsuragi District|Q1131013|qid=Q1131013|1=Kitakatsuragi District, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}) and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system#other shrines|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=village shrine|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}. === Enshrined deities === Current {{ill|lt=enshrined deities|Q11591100|qid=Q11591100|1=Saijin}} are the following five pillars. * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|qid=Q2564508}} * {{ill|lt=Empress Jingū|Q232803|qid=Q232803|lt=Okinaga Tarashi-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Empress Jingū}} * {{ill|lt=Emperor Ōjin|Q317997|qid=Q317997|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}} * {{ill|lt=Tamayori-hime (Hyūga myth)|Q3082751|qid=Q3082751|lt=Tamayori-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Tamayori-hime (mother of Jimmu)}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu-kōdaijin|1=UNKNOWN}} In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} completed in {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|qid=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}} 5 ({{ill|lt=927|Q30470|qid=Q30470|1=927}}), only one deity seat is recorded, and the following identifications are given: * Hi no Tobata no Kami ({{ill|lt=Tokusen Jinmyōchō|Q11571092|qid=Q11571092|1=Tokusen Jinmyōchō}}) * Hi no Tobata-hime-no-Mikoto ({{ill|lt=Jinmyōchō Kōshō|Q11588824|qid=Q11588824|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō Studies}}) * Hi no Tobata-hime (Hobata Shrine Record) From this, the original founding deity is inferred to have been Hi no Tobata-hime-no-Mikoto. === History === === Outline === Shrine tradition says it was founded in {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|qid=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} 1 ({{ill|lt=806|Q30021|qid=Q30021|1=806}}). According to {{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|qid=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}, twenty households of {{ill|lt=shinpu|Q1689534|qid=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}} were donated in the same year, suggesting the actual origin predates that. On October 1 of {{ill|lt=Tenshō|Q1145058|qid=Q1145058|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 5 ({{ill|lt=1577|Q6704|qid=Q6704|1=1577}}), {{ill|lt=Hatakeyama Yoshinobu (Azuchi-Momoyama period)|Q135692849|qid=Q135692849|lt=Hatakeyama Yoshinobu|1=Hatakeyama Yoshinobu}}, Ebina Tomokiyo, and Mori Masatomo, who rebelled against {{ill|lt=Oda Nobunaga|Q171411|qid=Q171411|1=Oda Nobunaga}} with {{ill|lt=Matsunaga Hisahide|Q1143038|qid=Q1143038|1=Matsunaga Hisahide}}, shut themselves in {{ill|lt=Kataoka Castle|Q11569697|qid=Q11569697|1=Kataoka Castle}} and were killed by {{ill|lt=Akechi Mitsuhide|Q313320|qid=Q313320|1=Akechi Mitsuhide}}, {{ill|lt=Hosokawa Fujitaka|Q1207509|qid=Q1207509|1=Hosokawa Fujitaka}}, and {{ill|lt=Tsutsui Junkei|Q8192220|qid=Q8192220|1=Tsutsui Junkei}}. A tradition recorded in "Taikoku documents" says Mitsumatsu Hachiman-sha was founded to console Yoshinobu's spirit buried in Kataoka Castle and later became Hobata ShrineHideyuki Ichikawa, "From goryō to village deity: early-modern miyaza and shrines seen in Mitsumatsu Hachiman," Kyoto Folk Society ed., 'Kyoto Folklore' (7), 1989.. In the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, it is listed as {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, receiving offerings in monthly and Niiname rites. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}} it was called Hachiman-gū. In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 (1874), it was ranked {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|qid=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|qid=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|qid=Q2284|1=January 27}}, from Junior Fifth Rank Lower to Junior Fifth Rank Upper ({{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|qid=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}) - listed as "Hobata deity" === Precinct === ファイル:火幡神社入口 - DHvLYN8VwAAU5d0.jpg|First torii ファイル:火幡神社本殿 - DHvNjLvVoAEs2wW.jpg|Honden ファイル:火幡神社絵馬殿 - DHvMJwoUwAEU71q.jpg|Ema hall === Transportation === * 10 minutes on foot from {{ill|lt=Hatakeda Station|Q3655902|qid=Q3655902|1=Hatakeda Station}} on {{ill|lt=JR West|Q502125|qid=Q502125|lt=JR West|1=West Japan Railway Company}} {{ill|lt=Wakayama Line|Q511543|qid=Q511543|1=Wakayama Line}} === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.town.oji.nara.jp/kankobunkasuports/rekishi_shiryoshitsu/bunkazai_map/742.html Hobata Shrine] - Ōji Town cultural property map == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hobata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hobata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hobata Shrine]][[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:王寺町の建築物]] [[Category:王寺町の歴史]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]]
